subcodes.first_line: O ye who stand fast in the Covenant! Praise be unto God that from every quarter the means of unity, harmony and connection, through His aid [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابتان بر پیمان الحمد لله از جمیع جهات اسباب اتحاد و اتفاق و ارتباط بعون و
subcodes.subjects: @charitable associations; humanitarian activities, @education of children; moral education, @unity; oneness of humanity, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar]
